[chain-adapter] calling get_oldest_signature_block_time(...) — paginated getSignaturesForAddress
== D10 launch_audit via mg_onchain_chain_adapter::solana ==
  pages fetched:    2 (cap 50, ≤ 50,000 signatures)
  scan complete:    false
  stop reason:      RPC error: {"code":429,"message":"Too many requests for a specific RPC call"}
  oldest signature observed: 2026-04-28T16:34:47+00:00 (UNIX=1777394087)
  observed-window age: 0 days (incomplete scan; observed window may be much shorter than true token age)
  D10 verdict: UNKNOWN (incomplete scan, observed window <7d) (severity=Info, confidence=0.00)
    rationale: incomplete scan and observed window <7d — cannot distinguish fresh launch from recent activity on a mature token. Use --rpc <self-hosted> to complete the scan.

[chain-adapter] calling get_recent_signatures(...) — page-1 sig list for activity histogram
== D04 pump-dump (proxy via signature-rate, NOT real swap-event detection) ==
  signatures fetched: 0 (1 page; complete=false)
  stop reason:        RPC error: {"code":429,"message":"Too many requests for a specific RPC call"}
  D04 verdict: UNKNOWN — no block_times returned (RPC blocked before page 1 yielded data)

== D11 synchronized-activity (proxy via 10s-bucket burst rate) ==
  D11-proxy verdict: UNKNOWN — shares signature data path with D04; both blocked by public-RPC throttling
    rationale: use --rpc <self-hosted> Solana node to bypass mainnet-beta rate limits

== summary ==
  D01 honeypot static:       evaluated (regular-SPL state path; Token-2022 TLV deferred)
  D02/D06 mint-state:        evaluated end-to-end (mint + freeze authority)
  D03 holder_concentration:  evaluated end-to-end (full holder distribution)
  D04 pump-dump proxy:       evaluated (signature-rate; real swap-event D04 deferred)
  D10 launch_audit:          evaluated end-to-end (oldest signature, RPC-paged)
  D11 sync-activity proxy:   evaluated (10s-bucket burst rate; per-tx sender decode deferred)

  not yet evaluated by this CLI (need event-stream / multi-event decode):
    D05 wash_trading         (needs full transfer graph + cycle detection)
    D07 withdraw_withheld    (Token-2022 only; ORCA is regular SPL)
    D08 sybil                (needs cluster store + funding-graph traversal)
    D09 deployer_changepoint (needs deployer launch-history)
    D12 permit2_drainer      (Ethereum-only)
    D13 sandwich_mev         (Ethereum-only)
